scenes.text: My mom used to put little notes in my lunchbox.
scenes.image_prompt: A child's open lunchbox on a school cafeteria table, a small folded note visible next to a sandwich, soft fluorescent and natural light mix, nostalgic mood, cinematic shallow depth of field, 4k

scenes.text: Just simple things. You're going to do great today. I'm proud of you.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of a small handwritten note on torn notebook paper, blue ink cursive writing, warm soft lighting, a mother's handwriting, emotional macro shot, cinematic, 4k

scenes.text: I used to hide them so my friends wouldn't see. I was embarrassed.
scenes.image_prompt: A child's hand quickly sliding a small paper note into a pocket under a school desk, motion blur, cafeteria background out of focus, cinematic perspective, warm tones, 4k

scenes.text: Now I'm thirty-two and I found one folded inside an old textbook.
scenes.image_prompt: An adult hand holding open a worn textbook with a small yellowed folded note falling out, warm lamp light in a quiet room, dust particles in air, emotional cinematic moment, 4k

scenes.text: I would give anything to be embarrassed by her love one more time.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of an adult holding a tiny folded note against their chest, eyes closed, single tear, warm golden light, deeply emotional portrait, cinematic shallow depth of field, 4k
